calendar.matters:
Order To Show Cause - For Respondent Michael Fielding Allen, M.D. Why He Has Not Produced The Documents As Required By Investigational Subpoenas Issued By The Medical Board Of California (Per Order Filed 11/19/19)
Off Calendar Dec-20-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: There being no appearances and no one contesting the tentative ruling, the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Order To Show Cause - For Respondent Michael Fielding Allen, M.D. Why He Has Not Produced The Documents As Required By Investigational Subpoenas Issued By The Medical Board Of California.

The petition for an order compelling compliance with investigational subpoenas issued by the Medical Board of State of California is granted.

An order compelling compliance with investigational subpoenas is signed and filed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
